name: jcp-home
description: Personal website with Sanity CMS integration

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:sanity
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd dev/web && npm install && cd ../sanity && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules dev/web/node_modules dev/web/dist dev/web/.vite dev/sanity/node_modules
